name: HugoMojo
description: A free 16-question scanner for people who use AI tools but still do not know what to build first.
coreAnswer: The problem is usually not a lack of AI tools. It is path mismatch.

paths.name: Hunter
paths.label: Service-first
paths.summary: Use AI to shape one offer, contact real buyers, and get fast market feedback.

paths.name: Artisan
paths.label: Asset-first
paths.summary: Use AI to package one repeated problem into a template, checklist, guide, prompt set, or small product.

paths.name: Architect
paths.label: System-first
paths.summary: Use AI to review messy workflows, repeated operations, handoffs, and automation opportunities.

disclaimer: Educational guidance only. No income guarantees.
